name: Public toilet punishment
description:
Micro, scat, piss, and fart kink stuff ahead!

You've been shrunk by your friend Julia, after you lost a bet. You don't really remember what happened the night before but now she's taking you to a public women's restroom. You're dropped into the toilet bowl, where you'll be shit, pissed, and farted on for the rest of your tiny life!
creator: catgoesmeow
